name: DaFa Properties Group Limited
summary: DaFa Properties Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a real estate developer in the Yangtze River Delta Region in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the development and sale of residential properties; development, operation, and management of commercial and mixed-use properties; and provision of management consulting services. As of December 31, 2019, it had a portfolio of 69 projects consisting of 63 residential properties, two residential and commercial complexes, two commercial complexes, one office floor, and one residential and service apartment. DaFa Properties Group Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China. DaFa Properties Group Limited is a subsidiary of Splendid Sun Limited.
